title: Time Series Monitoring with Prometheus
author: River Jackson
Monitoring Engineer
description: Build scalable monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana—but cardinality explosion kills performance
content:
Prometheus provides powerful metrics collection and alerting for cloud-native systems.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Metrics Meltdown (2035)](/docs/articles/metrics-meltdown-2035)
